response.overview: Poor Rosemary was tasked with one job: gain the president's trust. However, this proves to be much harder than expected. The president is as gullible as everyone expects and clearly falls for the agent's charms, but Javier Milei's sexual appetites are much more revolting than expected. Making the job hard to stomach even for an experienced professional such as Rosemary.  Comedy, horror and important moments of reflection about the current social situation can be found in this masterpiece by first-time director Santiago Caputo, who clearly takes a lot from John Waters. This movie is a guaranteed once in a lifetime experience for anyone bold enough to live it.
response.title: Milei's Sex Life
